title.rendered: AMI to Enable Arm Ecosystem with Arm SystemReady SR-SIE Certified UEFI and BMC Firmware on the NVIDIA Grace Platforms

content.rendered:
AMI is pleased to announce that it has become one of the first Independent Firmware Vendors (IFV) to receive the Arm SystemReady SR v2.4 with Security Interface Extension (SIE) v1.2 certificate for the NVIDIA GH200 P4352 Reference Platform with AMI’s Aptio V System Firmware solution. This marks another noteworthy achievement for AMI’s solutions as they continue to enable Arm SystemReady SR certificates on NVIDIA GH200-based platforms.

To learn more, please read the official press release.

This marks another noteworthy achievement for AMI’s solutions as they continue to […]
